overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in white robes walking through a sunlit stone temple courtyard and ascending a wide staircase toward an ornate wooden door. The scene features high-quality game engine rendering with ancient architectural elements, decorative turquoise lamp posts, and armored guard NPCs.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit stone temple courtyard toward a grand entrance. A guard in ornate armor stands to the left while decorative turquoise lamp posts flank the approach to the large wooden temple door.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway leading to temple entrance

events.description: character transitions from flat courtyard to ascending the wide stone staircase
character passes an armored guard walking down the stairs on the right side

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs steadily toward the large wooden temple door

notable_agents.action: armored guard in dark metal armor walking down the stairs, passing the character

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with multiple steps leading up to the temple entrance

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wide stone staircase toward the temple entrance, passing an armored guard walking in the opposite direction. The ornate wooden door and stone facade grow larger as the character climbs, with the decorative turquoise lamp posts now flanking the sides at close range.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit temple courtyard that culminates in an ascent toward a grand entrance. It begins with the character walking across the stone courtyard, passing an armored guard and decorative turquoise lamp posts while heading toward a large wooden door. As the character moves forward, the perspective shifts upward to follow the climb up a wide stone staircase. The scene then tightens as the character passes another guard walking in the opposite direction, bringing the turquoise lamp posts into close range. Finally, the ornate wooden door and the detailed stone facade expand to fill the frame as the character reaches the top of the stairs.
